```html

  .example-thumbnail {
    --wje-thumbnail-width: 80px !important;
    --wje-thumbnail-height: 80px !important;
    --wje-border-radius: 24px !important;
  }
</style>

<wje-thumbnail class="example-thumbnail">
  <img alt="Silhouette of mountains" src="../../../../../img/demos/thumbnail.svg" />
</wje-thumbnail>
```
